subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all utterance, beseemeth and is worthy of the Purpose of all creation, Who hath drawn unto Him the hearts of the sincere and the monotheists [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از بیان مقصود امکانرا لایق و سزاست که افئده مخلصین و موحدین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
